configurations.name: kompas-web
runtimeArgs: import os,http.server,socketserver,functools; cands=[os.environ.get('PWD'),'/Users/ardisuhanda/Documents/GitHub/app-kompas','.']; d=next((c for c in cands if c and os.path.isfile(os.path.join(c,'index.html'))),'.'); H=functools.partial(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler,directory=d); socketserver.TCPServer.allow_reuse_address=True; socketserver.TCPServer(('',int(os.environ.get('PORT','5173'))),H).serve_forever()
